ddls:
CREATE TABLE "executives" (
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the executive */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role/title of the executive */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the executive */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the executive oversees */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the executive was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the executive left the company (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number */,
  "mobile_phone" TEXT /* Mobile phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the executive */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the executive's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executive conducting the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at the time of transaction */,
  "value" REAL /* Total value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sell, buy) */,
  "brokerage_fees" REAL /* Fees paid to the brokerage firm */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the broker who facilitated the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executive who manages the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget for the department */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated transaction */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the alert (e.g., unusual volume) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for resolving the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_alerts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type (e.g., Buy, Sell) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is taxable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Chief Executive Officer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Detailed responsibilities of the role */,
  "reporting_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the executive to whom the role reports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_reporting_to FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_to") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executive_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executive profile */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executive */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the executive */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in the industry */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the executive */,
  "previous_employers" TEXT /* List of previous employers */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards or recognitions received by the executive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price recording */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shareholdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding record */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executive */,
  "shares_owned" INTEGER /* Number of shares currently owned by the executive */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the shareholding was last updated */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the shares were acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shareholdings_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executive who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the action was recorded */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was taken */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "executive_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the executive the report is for */,
  "transaction_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the executive's transactions */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who generated the report */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the generated report file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_reports_executive_id FOREIGN KEY ("executive_id") REFERENCES executives ("executive_id")
)
